error_signature: task request was timed out after 60 seconds
title: Code Node task request timeout
symptom: The Code Node fails to execute and returns a timeout error after 60 seconds. This prevents the workflow from completing successfully.
not_this_if: Using built-in JavaScript or Python execution without external runners
root_cause: The timeout occurs because the task broker URI is incorrectly configured, causing the Code Node to fail to communicate with the worker responsible for executing the code. The default URI points to the main n8n instance instead of the worker.
fix_steps: Locate the environment variable 'N8N_RUNNERS_TASK_BROKER_URI' in your docker-compose file.
Restart the n8n services to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Update the task broker URI in the docker-compose file and restart the services.
